query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE accountId IN (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%test%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%demo%')) as contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE accountId IN (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%test%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%demo%')) as messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE accountId IN (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%test%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%demo%')) as campaigns,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_calls WHERE accountId IN (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%test%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%demo%')) as aiCalls;
